title: Midwives
description: Provide prenatal care and childbirth assistance.

tasks.text: Monitor maternal condition during labor by checking vital signs, monitoring uterine contractions, or performing physical examinations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify tubal and ectopic pregnancies and refer patients for treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide necessary medical care for infants at birth, including emergency care such as resuscitation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct ongoing prenatal health assessments, tracking changes in physical and emotional health.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor fetal growth and well-being through heartbeat detection, body measurement, and palpation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Establish and follow emergency or contingency plans for mothers and newborns.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify, monitor, or treat pregnancy-related problems such as hypertension, gestational diabetes, pre-term labor, or retarded fetal growth.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Obtain complete health and medical histories from patients including medical, surgical, reproductive, or mental health histories.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate patients' laboratory and medical records, requesting assistance from other practitioners when necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain documentation of all patients' contacts, reviewing and updating records as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assess the status of post-date pregnancies to determine treatments and interventions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set up or monitor the administration of oxygen or medications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Suture perineal lacerations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform post-partum health assessments of mothers and babies at regular intervals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test patients' hemoglobin, hematocrit, and blood glucose levels.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Counsel women regarding the nutritional requirements of pregnancy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide information about the physical and emotional processes involved in the pregnancy, labor, birth, and postpartum periods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Refer patients to specialists for procedures such as ultrasounds or biophysical profiles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist maternal patients to find physical positions that will facilitate childbirth.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess birthing environments to ensure cleanliness, safety, and the availability of appropriate supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Incorporate research findings into practice as appropriate.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Estimate patients' due dates and re-evaluate as necessary based on examination results.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide comfort and relaxation measures for mothers in labor through interventions such as massage, breathing techniques, hydrotherapy, or music.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide, or refer patients to other providers for, education or counseling on topics such as genetic testing, newborn care, contraception, or breastfeeding.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide patients with contraceptive and family planning information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect specimens for use in laboratory tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform patients of how to prepare and supply birth sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Respond to breech birth presentations by applying methods such as exercises or external version.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform annual gynecologic exams, including pap smears and breast exams.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, implement, or evaluate individualized plans for midwifery care.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend the use of vitamin and mineral supplements to enhance the health of patients and children.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide information about community health and social resources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile and evaluate clinical practice statistics.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Treat patients' symptoms with alternative health care methods such as herbs or hydrotherapy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Complete birth certificates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate in research studies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
